items.title: Boeing, Leonardo Partner for US Army Flight School Next Contract
items.description: Boeing [NYSE: BA] and Leonardo are collaborating to pursue the U.S. Army's Flight School Next contractor-owned, contractor-operated (COCO) service contract.

items.title: BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) Valuation: Is There More Upside After Recent Market Movement?
items.description: BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) shares have edged slightly lower over the past week, moving in step with broader market activity. There has not been a major event driving the action, so investors may be watching for fresh catalysts. See our latest analysis for BAE Systems. While BAE Systems’ shares have dipped slightly in recent days, that does little to dampen the bigger story. The company has notched an impressive 71.9% share price return so far this year, and its one-year total shareholder return...
